overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The camera follows a car through neon-lit streets featuring massive holographic billboards, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic skyscrapers, culminating in a dramatic upward pan toward towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved downtown street with holographic advertising tower

agents.ego_description: following a black sedan through a curved urban street lined with neon-lit commercial buildings and wet reflective pavement

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead on the wet road with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements and multiple display bands
building with dark blue awning and multiple digital billboards displaying advertisements
tall building with illuminated teal windows and modern glass facade
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk along the curved street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving through a curved downtown street at dusk, following a black sedan. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings. A massive circular holographic advertising tower dominates the center of the view ahead, while palm trees and commercial buildings line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: vehicle begins left turn at intersection, passing the circular holographic tower on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn at a traffic light while following the lead vehicle through the intersection

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing at the corner near a digital advertising kiosk

entered.detail: modern horizontal traffic signal with illuminated lights
illuminated advertising display showing a man's face on the sidewalk corner
futuristic overpass with glowing cyan support structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection and executes a left turn, moving from the curved street into a wider intersection area. The circular holographic tower passes to the right side of the frame as new elements like a traffic light structure and elevated highway ramp come into view. A pedestrian in a red jacket stands near a digital kiosk at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown corridor with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the towering skyscrapers and massive holographic displays overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street after the turn, then dramatically tilting the camera upward to view the massive skyscrapers and neon billboards above

entered.detail: massive tower with teal interior lighting and extensive glass facade rising high above the street
giant pink and yellow digital display running vertically up the side of a building
tall building with illuminated corporate signage near the top

segments.scene_description: After completing the turn, the vehicle continues down a street lined with massive corporate skyscrapers. The camera then tilts dramatically upward, revealing towering glass buildings with teal interior lighting and enormous vertical holographic billboards. The circular holographic tower from earlier is now visible in the distance to the left, while the camera focuses on the immense scale of the futuristic architecture above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown corridor that transitions from a street-level chase into a dramatic vertical reveal of a corporate skyline. It begins by following a black sedan along a curved road of wet asphalt, where the vibrant reflections of the city mirror a massive circular holographic tower looming ahead. As the vehicle executes a left turn at a wide intersection, the holographic tower shifts to the right, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket and an elevated highway ramp. The scene then opens up into a canyon of massive corporate skyscrapers, with the camera tilting sharply upward to capture the immense scale of glass buildings and vertical billboards. Finally, the view settles on the towering architecture and teal interior lighting of the heights, leaving the distant holographic tower behind.
